title: Alsophila negrosiana
taxonomy: Alsophila negrosiana is classified within the plant family Dicksoniaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as tree ferns. The genus Alsophila belongs to the subfamily Dicksonioideae. Alsophila negrosiana is further classified as a species within the genus Alsophila. This classification places the plant within the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. The combination of these classifications provides a comprehensive understanding of the plant's position within the plant kingdom.

The plant's leaves and roots are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
